hook: A lot of romantic desperation is amplified by a deeper shortage of belonging elsewhere.
body: When men lack emotional connection in friendship and community, dating starts carrying too much of the burden.

hook: Many men try to solve general loneliness with romantic pursuit alone.
body: Romance matters, but it should not be the only place your emotional life gets oxygen.

hook: Romance matters, but it should not be the only place your emotional life gets oxygen.
body: A man with a stronger friendship base often dates with less panic than one who feels invisible everywhere else.

hook: A man with a stronger friendship base often dates with less panic than one who feels invisible everywhere else.
body: Invest in one friendship that could make your life feel less emotionally starved even without a relationship.
